description: Benchmark selection for validating whether ZWIAD profiles predict steering method success

A_PRISTINE.rationale: Clean linear signal — simple linear steering sufficient

D_MULTICONCEPT.rationale: Multiple concept directions — subspace method needed

E_MARGINAL.rationale: Few concentrated directions — dynamic pulse approach

G_WEAK.rationale: Weak but still linear — CAA best of limited options

success_criteria.strong: Predicted method is actual winner for >=6/8 profiles
success_criteria.moderate: Predicted method in top-3 for >=16/22 benchmarks
success_criteria.weak: Significant correlation (p<0.05) between profile and method ranking
